summaries.theme_name: App Performance, Bugs, and User Experience
actionable_ideas: Improve the app's performance during market hours to prevent crashes and loading issues
Enhance the user interface to provide easier access to features like UPI, charts, and mutual fund information
Develop a more responsive and helpful customer support system, potentially including human support options

summaries.theme_name: App Performance, Fees, and User Experience
actionable_ideas: Reduce or restructure brokerage charges to make the app more competitive and user-friendly
Improve the app's performance by fixing bugs, enhancing the user interface, and streamlining features like auto-update and withdrawal processes
Consider adding support for local languages to cater to a broader user base and enhance overall user satisfaction
